autoDismiss.tooltipBody: How long the inline "Cancelled" status and banner stay visible after you abort a search.
autoDismiss.tooltipNever: "Never" keeps the Cancelled status on screen until you dismiss it manually, Retry, or start a fresh search.
autoDismiss.helperNever: "Never" keeps the Cancelled status visible until you dismiss it, Retry the previous search, or start a fresh one.
